tasks.title: Voice API types + client
Voice Zustand store
PTT button + waveform + controls components
Voice message + conversation + session list components
Voice hooks (recording, WS, health)
Voice page composition
Floating voice button (FAB) + quick panel
i18n voice translations
tasks.description:
Add Polish and English translations for the voice module.

Depends on: nothing (can run in parallel with group 1, but listed in group 1).

## Existing i18n files to update:
- `apps/web/messages/pl.json`
- `apps/web/messages/en.json`

Add a `"voice"` key to both files with all UI strings used by voice components.

### Polish (`pl.json`) — add this block:
```json
"voice": {
  "title": "Interfejs głosowy",
  "subtitle": "Rozmawiaj z Gilbertusem głosem",
  "pushToTalk": "Naciśnij i przytrzymaj aby mówić",
  "holdSpace": "Przytrzymaj spację",
  "recording": "Nagrywam...",
  "processing": "Przetwarzam...",
  "playing": "Odtwarzam...",
  "modeHttp": "Standardowy",
  "modeWs": "Real-time",
  "wsConnected": "Połączono",
  "wsDisconnected": "Rozłączono",
  "history": "Historia",
  "newSession": "Nowa sesja",
  "noMessages": "Naciśnij przycisk lub spację aby rozpocząć",
  "deleteSession": "Usuń sesję",
  "deleteConfirm": "Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć tę sesję?",
  "online": "Online",
  "partial": "Częściowo dostępny",
  "offline": "Offline",
  "openFullView": "Otwórz pełny widok",
  "voiceAssistant": "Asystent głosowy",
  "stopPlayback": "Zatrzymaj odtwarzanie",
  "commandBrief": "Brief",
  "commandStatus": "Status",
  "commandMarket": "Rynek",
  "commandCompetitors": "Konkurencja",
  "commandScenarios": "Scenariusze",
  "commandAlerts": "Alerty",
  "micPermission": "Wymagany dostęp do mikrofonu",
  "micDenied": "Dostęp do mikrofonu został zablokowany. Zmień ustawienia przeglądarki.",
  "errorConnection": "Błąd połączenia",
  "errorTranscription": "Błąd transkrypcji",
  "messages": "wiadomości"
}
```

### English (`en.json`) — add this block:
```json
"voice": {
  "title": "Voice Interface",
  "subtitle": "Talk to Gilbertus by voice",
  "pushToTalk": "Press and hold to speak",
  "holdSpace": "Hold Space",
  "recording": "Recording...",
  "processing": "Processing...",
  "playing": "Playing...",
  "modeHttp": "Standard",
  "modeWs": "Real-time",
  "wsConnected": "Connected",
  "wsDisconnected": "Disconnected",
  "history": "History",
  "newSession": "New session",
  "noMessages": "Press the button or Space to start",
  "deleteSession": "Delete session",
  "deleteConfirm": "Are you sure you want to delete this session?",
  "online": "Online",
  "partial": "Partially available",
  "offline": "Offline",
  "openFullView": "Open full view",
  "voiceAssistant": "Voice Assistant",
  "stopPlayback": "Stop playback",
  "commandBrief": "Brief",
  "commandStatus": "Status",
  "commandMarket": "Market",
  "commandCompetitors": "Competitors",
  "commandScenarios": "Scenarios",
  "commandAlerts": "Alerts",
  "micPermission": "Microphone access required",
  "micDenied": "Microphone access was denied. Update your browser settings.",
  "errorConnection": "Connection error",
  "errorTranscription": "Transcription error",
  "messages": "messages"
}
```

IMPORTANT: These are existing JSON files. Add the `"voice"` key at the appropriate location (alphabetically among other module keys). Do NOT modify any existing translations.
